posts.author: ncortez (Neri)
posts.cookedHtml:
Request: Notify when a template is used

Scenario: Some of the automations/integrations are not working when a new board has been created. As advised by your support team, the automation/integration needs to be rebuilt. However, I need to be notified when a board is created so I can recreate it.
